changelog: **Task Next button**: Aligned `Label.NextTasks` resolver slug from legacy `next-tasks` → `next-steps` to match the renamed canonical prompt (`standalone-scripts/prompts/13-next-tasks/info.json` Slug = `next-steps`). Previously the resolver only matched via the P2 id-substring fallback; P1 (exact slug) now matches directly, so the updated v5/v7 "Next ${N} Steps" prompt is pasted correctly when clicking Task Next.
